title: Glaciar Margerie, Parque Nacional Bahía del Glaciar, Alaska, Estados Unidos, 2017-08-19, DD 33
description: Tidewater glacier face in Glacier Bay National Park photographed from a cruise ship, August 2017. Low cloud hanging in the surrounding mountains, small icebergs in the foreground water.
alt: Tidewater glacier in Glacier Bay National Park with mist-capped mountains above
